column2: Changes your government type to Feudalism.

Settles your horde into a feudal realm. Your empire title is granted to a spawned successor – your nomadic capital is destroyed. Bypasses vanilla's castle-ownership prerequisite for "Settle into Feudalism".
Changes your government type to Iqta.

Settles your horde into a Muslim feudal realm. Your empire is demoted (e.g. Mongol Empire to Mongolia) and your nomadic capital is destroyed. Lighter than the Pagan equivalent (no successor spawn) but still a major realm change.

Changes your government type to Nomadic. The engine restructures your realm: creates an empire-tier title in your dynasty's name if you don't already hold one, creates a new nomadic-type holding to serve as your horde's capital, changes succession to nomad_succession, and severs any liege.
Changes your government type to Tribal.

Settles your horde into a tribal realm. Your empire title is granted to a spawned successor – remaining holdings convert to tribal versions of their former nomadic structure. No vanilla equivalent player decision.
